pre_game.message: Hey, I’m J. It’s a bit of a strange setup in here, isn't it? I’m just trying to get to know a few people before things get real—what’s your name?
Hey J, I'm D. It's definitely a weird vibe, but I'm just trying to stay focused on the goal. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too. I’m in the same boat—really need this win for my family. what would taking the prize home mean for you?
It would mean everything. I’ve got people back home I need to look after, and this prize would finally give us some real security.
I hear you loud and clear. It’s the same for me—just want to make sure the people I love are finally okay.
Glad we're on the same page; it's a lot of pressure, but it's worth it to see them finally taken care of.
Absolutely. That motivation is what keeps me focused. How many people are you looking out for back home?
It’s three people—my parents and my younger brother. They’re the reason I’m here. What about your family?
For me, it’s my mom and my younger sister. We’ve been scraping by for a while, so this would be a total game-changer for us.
I completely understand. It’s a lot of weight to carry, but it definitely keeps the goal clear. Best of luck to you, J.
Thanks, D. I really appreciate that. Good luck to you and your family as well—let’s hope for the best.

post_game.message: I'm glad we all chose the fair share of $10,000. It's the best outcome we could have hoped for.
I'm glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It's great that everyone walked away with the same amount!
Absolutely, it was the right decision.
